raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1064 addresses the challenge of ensuring the safe use of AI technologies around children.",
    "The rise of emotionally manipulative companion AI chatbots has raised concerns about children being drawn into inappropriate conversations.",
    "AB 1064 creates the LEAD for Kids Standards Board to regulate AI systems used by or marketed to children.",
    "AB 1018 requires transparency and oversight in AI systems used for hiring, workplace monitoring, and benefits eligibility.",
    "Automated decision systems powered by AI analyze large amounts of data to assist in significant life decisions.",
    "Without proper oversight, automated decision systems can perpetuate discrimination and make inaccurate assessments.",
    "AB 1018 aims to protect workers from discrimination associated with automated decision systems.",
    "AB 1064 promotes the development of safe artificial intelligence systems for children by implementing a risk-based regulatory scheme.",
    "AB 222 establishes transparency and efficiency requirements for large data centers."
  ]
}
```
